scripts.dev: concurrently -n "hono,next" -c "green,blue" "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.test: npm run test:back && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: concurrently -n "hono-test,front-test,e2e" -c "green,blue,yellow" --kill-others --kill-signal SIGKILL --success first "npm run test:back:server" "npm run test:front:server" "npm run test:e2e:wait"
scripts.test:e2e:wait: wait-on http://localhost:3457/health tcp:3002 && npm --workspace=frontend run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:headed: concurrently -n "hono-test,front-test,e2e" -c "green,blue,yellow" --kill-others --kill-signal SIGKILL --success first "npm run test:back:server" "npm run test:front:server" "wait-on http://localhost:3457/health tcp:3002 && npm --workspace=frontend run test:e2e:headed"
scripts.test:e2e:ui: concurrently -n "hono-test,front-test" -c "green,blue" --kill-others --kill-signal SIGKILL "npm run test:back:server" "npm run test:front:server" "wait-on http://localhost:3457/health tcp:3002 && npm --workspace=frontend run test:e2e:ui"
